decisions.what: Added a cron job to refresh Manus daily credits
decisions.why: To automate the scheduling of 300 daily credits at 00:01 UT
To document the discovered Manus API field names for future reference

decisions.what: Pushed changes to the master branch
decisions.why: To persist modifications and share them with the repository

decisions.what: Searched for "manus" references in docs and config files
decisions.why: To locate where Manus is configured and referenced

decisions.what: Compiled and executed the dispatch script with the API key
decisions.why: To verify that the script works correctly with the provided credentials

blockers.what: Initial cron entry for Manus credit refresh was missing
blockers.reason: Required manual creation to schedule the daily credit trigger

discoveries: A dispatch-credits.jsonl file exists and tracks credit usage
The Manus API field names were documented in manus-api-field-names.md
Manus references were found in config/workers.yaml, config/lanes.yaml, and config/models.yaml
The cron job triggers 300 daily credits at 00:01 UT
A dispatch-research JSON file was located at /tmp/dispatch/dispatch-research-*.json
